title: Aldebaran Resources Completes C$45M LIFE Offering and Concurrent Private Placement
content:
## Aldebaran Resources Completes C$45M LIFE Offering and Concurrent Private Placement
On February 5, 2026, Aldebaran Resources Inc. (“Aldebaran”) completed a bought deal private placement pursuant to the listed issuer financing exemption, issuing 12,384,695 common shares at a price of C$3.25 per share for aggregate gross proceeds of approximately C$40 million. In connection with the offering, Aldebaran also completed a concurrent non‑brokered private placement of an additional 1,538,462 common shares to existing shareholders at the same price, for gross proceeds of approximately C$5 million, which closed on February 17, 2026.
Aldebaran, headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, is a mineral exploration company focused on the Altar copper‑gold project in San Juan Province, Argentina.
McCarthy Tétrault advised Aldebaran with a team led by Jack Schroder that included Farhiyah Shariff and Jonathan Brisebois (Business).
